textByHashes.b1d8cec98cfa61a5340d80efb0198d65cab96d0f: Why, yes, it is. I must have left it behind somewhere...
textByHashes.32ae3cf3c9a56c17c2558bd40f2e8e34943faf18: It's Glough... I fear for the worst!
textByHashes.c422280af3ff7410131ce7944cddaaeabc2b6bd7: I think he might be seeing someone else! I hadn't heard from him in a while, and so decided to give him a visit.
textByHashes.f622531c8c3e8b85c546705e3334906ac319b208: At first, I thought there was nobody home... But then I heard...
textByHashes.49f2334d542ae83bc3b47d33a558f7e19dffcaa2: I've already said too much. The last time I helped you, Glough lost his job!
textByHashes.2b550a43007f5d84a8c5df2d4400735321612256: I heard whispering coming from higher up in his tree! I managed to climb the first branch... But I'm not agile enough to get up to the highest level...
textByHashes.c6063c1934303f1d02f87f3ca06a5334f5d52fe4: Do you really think he might have gotten into trouble?
textByHashes.ea121b703e30dea7e7b2f791c353f499293f31db: There's nowhere else the voices could have been coming from... Please, climb up there and let me know what you find!
textByHashes.c9d59764ccfbd2cd38cf2bc8860c2389023496f7: The last time I helped you... Glough lost his job!
textByHashes.e10ea0a8dbddee05be39e5681123bfd838167ad2: Hmm... This certainly isn't Glough's handwriting...
textByHashes.d417fc1d47db3a1f6d0a133f0b5149b9b8ac5dc4: Here you go, hopefully it helps you find Glough.
textByHashes.8c1e30bc74d9bc8e9717d2543c9764f471ef143b: Oh hello, I've seen you with the King.
textByHashes.1ffd71792c24b349865369d9a4d44e5d426f555f: You must know my boyfriend Glough then?
textByHashes.b1abf48284f8405603418a2e45d8c59930e1eb1c: Could you do me a favour?
textByHashes.21e9e37f6782503e919d20f60c5e6d2bbd52788d: Please give this key to Glough, he left it here last night.
textByHashes.ac49f5ea760ce12d732294fd3c55eef47e2ca453: Have you taken that key to Glough yet?
textByHashes.36a28ba0cc657e0de757155f313993459ed44ea5: Oh. Please take it to Glough!
textByHashes.40028a46d6e7297b8183c3051d5cab9014d74fa9: Glough was deeply troubled, . Fortunately Carado has helped me move on.
